title: Decision record: hand-rolled JSON scanner in SecretValue
description:
## Decision
SecretValue implements its own JSON field extraction (extract_field, extract_path, extract_path_field) using hand-rolled char-level and byte-level scanners rather than serde_json.

## Rationale
serde_json::from_str() allocates a serde_json::Value on the heap in non-Zeroizing memory. Deserializing a JSON secret blob through serde_json would create unzeroed copies of every field value before our code could extract the target field. The hand-rolled scanner extracts only the target field value, never allocating the full parse tree, and returns it in a Zeroizing buffer.

## Trade-off accepted
More code to maintain. Surrogate pair handling in the char scanner must be kept correct. Covered by unit tests with known vectors.

## Record this as a confirmed good decision.
